Note

License reminder: this project is distributed under the MIT License. See the repository LICENSE file. Disclaimer: this simulator is provided as-is for research, calibration, and educational use. Users assume all risks, including any direct or indirect damage, data loss, hardware damage, injury, or regulatory non-compliance arising from use or misuse.

Utilities

src.utils.config

Configuration Module

src.utils.data_logger

Data Logger Module

src.utils.speech

Simple vocal assistance utility.

Configuration Module

Central configuration for BLDC motor control application.

Contains default parameters, paths, and application settings.

author:

BLDC Control Team

version:

0.8.0

Data Logger Module

Handles data logging, CSV export, and history management.

author:

BLDC Control Team

version:

0.8.0

class src.utils.data_logger.DataLogger(log_dir=None)[source]

Bases: object

Data logger for simulation results.

Handles: - CSV export - JSON metadata - Data formatting - File management

__init__(log_dir=None)[source]

Initialize data logger.

Parameters:

log_dir (Path | None) – Directory for log files

save_simulation_data(history, metadata=None, filename=None, use_custom_path=False)[source]

Save simulation data to CSV and metadata to JSON.

Parameters:

  • history (dict[str, ndarray]) – History dictionary from SimulationEngine.get_history()

  • metadata (dict[str, Any] | None) – Optional metadata to save

  • filename (str | None) – Optional filename (without extension) or full path if use_custom_path=True

  • use_custom_path (bool) – If True, filename is treated as full path

Returns:

Path to saved CSV file

Return type:

Path

load_simulation_data(filepath)[source]

Load simulation data from CSV.

Parameters:

filepath (Path) – Path to CSV file

Returns:

History dictionary with numpy arrays

Return type:

dict[str, ndarray]

Simple vocal assistance utility.

Provides text-to-speech output to assist visually impaired users. The module wraps pyttsx3 if installed, otherwise falls back to printing to console.

author:

BLDC Control Team

version:

0.8.0

src.utils.speech.set_audio_assistance_enabled(enabled)[source]

Enable or disable text-to-speech output globally.

Return type:

None

src.utils.speech.is_audio_assistance_enabled()[source]

Return current global audio-assistance state.

Return type:

bool

src.utils.speech.speak(message, rate=None)[source]

Announce a message vocally.

Parameters:

  • message (str) – Text to speak

  • rate (int | None) – Optional speech rate (words per minute)

Return type:

None
